name: Seitan with Red and Green Peppers
recipeIngredient: 2 cups Seitan; cut into thin, bite-sized pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix together the flour and garlic powder.
2. Dredge the seitan pieces in the flour mixture to coat them on both sides.
3. Heat 2 tablespoons of oil in a skillet and fry the seitan pieces until they are brown and crispy. Set aside the fried seitan and keep it warm while you cook the vegetables.
4. Heat the remaining oil in the skillet. Add the onion and sauté for 2-3 minutes. Add the peppers and sauté for a few minutes more; then add the mushrooms and about one-third of the seitan or vegetable broth.
5. Cover and simmer until the vegetables are tender, but still a bit crisp.
6. Dissolve the arrowroot in the remaining broth (if the broth is hot, dissolve the arrowroot in 2/4 cup of cold water first, then add it to the broth).
7. Pour the arrowroot broth into the skillet with the vegetables and mix well.
8. Raise the heat and cook, stirring constantly until the sauce thickens.
9. Serve the vegetables in their sauce over a bed of rice miollet, buckwheat or pasta. Top with the pieces of seitan.
